import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get staff member"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/staff/{user}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns a single staff member's profile.

PII fields are filtered based on the viewer's relationship to the staff member.
Returns 404 if the user is not a staff member.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
